output.setting: An abandoned, mist-covered lighthouse library at midnight

pickup.name: Old Library Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the door to the Forbidden Archive

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Shadow reveals a hidden key needed to open the next door
Clearing the room clears the path to the Spiral Staircase
Breaking the statue opens the heavy iron gate to the top Lantern Room

boss.name: The Silent Keeper
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sunlight Amulet to expose the Keeper to dawn and end the curse

output.objective: Restore the light to the lighthouse to break the eternal night
output.reward: Warden's Eternal Peace, a permanent buff increasing lantern brightness and detection range

output.setting: The decaying, neon-lit halls of an abandoned toy factory

encounters.trigger: Clearing the assembly line reveals the path to the dollroom.
The ballerina's defeat pushes open the door to the painted nursery.
The golem's collapse unlocks the grand doors to the Master Toymaker's Lair.

boss.name: The Master Toymaker
boss.victory_condition: Insert the key into his back to stop the clockwork.

output.objective: Escape the workshop by silencing the Master Toymaker.

Defeating the spider causes a pipe to burst, revealing a hidden elevator to the Atrium.

pickup.effect: Protects the player from boss static discharge

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel releases the locking mechanism for the ventilation shaft leading to the upper levels.
Destroying the drone triggers the emergency steam vent system, forcing entry into the main control chamber.
Overcoming the guard causes the blast doors to retract, exposing the Grand Artificer.

boss.name: Grand Artificer
boss.victory_condition: Use the Master Key-Wrench to disable the exoskeleton armor, exposing the pilot for a fatal strike.

output.objective: Infiltrate the Brass Citadel and stop the Grand Artificer's doomsday machine.
output.reward: The Golden Cog of Industry and the blueprint for a Perpetual Motion Engine.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel releases the locking mechanism for the ventilation shaft leading to the upper levels.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentry causes a pressure blowout, clearing the blockage to the Turbine Room.
The dying machine triggers a short circuit that opens the heavy blast door to the Furnace Chamber.

pickup.name: Essence of Storms
pickup.effect: Concentrated energy capable of overloading machinery

encounters.trigger: The construct collapses and creates a structural bridge leading to the final Control Bridge.

boss.name: The Steam-Bound Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Essence of Storms to overload the Overlord's central pressure core and cause a catastrophic system failure.

output.objective: Disable the central steam generator to stop the refinery's ominous production.

output.setting: The derelict industrial district of Oakhaven, a desolate city powered by rotting brass gears and leaking steam pipes.

encounters.hazard: Pressurized steam vents that deal periodic damage.

pickup.name: Brass Wrench
pickup.effect: Permanently increases damage of Temporal Chrono-Blade by 5.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentry causes it to fall onto the primary pressure lock, opening the hallway to the Echoing Hallway.

encounters.hazard: Crumbling floorboards that drop the player into lower maintenance shafts.

pickup.name: Temporal Capacitor
pickup.effect: Allows the player to perceive and exploit structural weaknesses.

encounters.trigger: The Automaton's collapse ruptures a coolant pipe, flooding the path and forcing the player into the Core Chamber.

encounters.hazard: Electrical leaks arcing across the narrow bridge.

pickup.name: Clockwork Gear
pickup.effect: A master key component that stops the internal movement of mechanical constructs.

encounters.trigger: The drone's explosion clears the rubble blocking the path to the Master Regulator, triggering the appearance of the boss.

boss.name: The Master Clockwork Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Clockwork Gear into the Guardian's chest port to cease its movement and stop the temporal decay.

output.objective: Restore the Great Clockwork to prevent the final breakdown of time in the desolate city.
output.reward: The Chronosphere core, an artifact granting permanent mastery over localized time rifts.

output.setting: A subterranean, fog-choked clockwork ruin beneath the capital city.

encounters.trigger: Breaking the gear-locked door seal triggers the alarm, alerting the next security unit.

pickup.name: Magnetic Anchor
pickup.effect: Pulls heavy metal objects towards target

encounters.trigger: Releasing the pressure valve summons the final security sentinel to the main catwalk.
Activating the main control panel opens the blast doors to the boss chamber.

boss.name: The Clockwork Titan
boss.victory_condition: Successfully insert the Core Stabilizer into the Titan's chest port to overload its internal engine.

output.objective: Disable the city's corrupt power source.
